policies.title: Repo must exist in ecosystem registry
policies.description: Every repository with a governance manifest must have a matching entry in the ecosystem registry.
policies.expected_check: Repository names in governance manifests resolve to entries in the ecosystem registry.

policies.title: Repo must declare a governance manifest
policies.description: All registered systems must publish a governance manifest describing identity and contract pins.
policies.expected_check: Registered systems expose a governance manifest aligned to the registry record.

policies.title: Manifest system_id must match registry entry
policies.description: Governance manifest system identifiers must align with the canonical ecosystem registry entry.
policies.expected_check: system_id in each manifest equals the system_id in the registry for the same repo.

policies.title: Manifest contract pins must exist in standards manifest
policies.description: Contracts pinned by governance manifests must reference contracts that are published in the standards manifest.
policies.expected_check: All contract keys in manifests are present in the standards manifest catalogue.

policies.title: Repo must not consume undeclared contracts
policies.description: Repos may only pin contracts that are declared for that repo in the ecosystem registry.
policies.expected_check: Manifest contract pins are a subset of the contracts listed for the repo in the registry.

policies.title: Standards manifest intended consumers must exist in ecosystem registry
policies.description: Every intended consumer listed for a contract must map to a repository in the ecosystem registry.
policies.expected_check: Intended consumers in the standards manifest reference registered repositories.

policies.title: Dependency graph systems must resolve to registered repos
policies.description: Systems enumerated in the ecosystem dependency graph must resolve to repositories in the ecosystem registry.
policies.expected_check: All systems in the dependency graph map to known repositories and identities.

policies.title: Governance repo must not contain production implementation package paths
policies.description: Governance/control-plane repositories must avoid production implementation package directories.
policies.expected_check: Governance repo tree lacks implementation-heavy directories such as src/, package/, spectrum_systems/, app/, or service/.
